targets.label: moms_phone
targets.comment: match by an SSID her phone keeps probing for (stable even as MAC rotates)
targets.on_arrive: logger -t presence 'mom arrived'; python3 /root/Raspyjack/EXTENSIONS/run_payload.py utilities/your_payload.py mom_here

targets.label: work_phone
targets.comment: match by MAC seen in Kismet (works until it re-randomizes)

targets.label: weird_device
targets.comment: a device you flagged from probe_discover.py, tracked by its probe string

targets.label: me_via_hotspot
targets.comment: BLE/Wi-Fi still work too; ssid = a network in range
